message:
chore(gitignore): Add .bv/ directory for beads viewer local state

The beads viewer (bv) tool creates a .bv/ directory for storing local
configuration and caches when working with the project's task tracking
system (.beads/). This directory contains user-specific state that
should not be committed to version control:

- Local UI preferences and view settings
- Cached data for faster loading
- Session-specific state

This aligns with the existing pattern of ignoring local tooling
directories (.venv/, target/, .research/) and prevents cluttering
the repository with machine-specific beads viewer artifacts.

The .beads/ directory itself (which contains the actual task definitions
and project roadmap with 69 tasks across 7 epics) remains tracked as it
represents shared project documentation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -14,3 +14,6 @@ rustbpe.pyi.bak
 .envrc
 wandb
 .research/
+
+# bv (beads viewer) local config and caches
+.bv/
